stage_artifact_runtime.completion_rule: required output roles plus valid manifest plus RCA owner receipt

stages.title: Source intake
stages.goal: Freeze source truth, audience, constraints, and missing-material risk before visual planning.

user_stage_log_contract.accounting_policy: OPL projects duration/token/cost status, source refs, and explicit missing reasons; duration may use provider or attempt wall-clock fallback for user readability while duration_telemetry_status stays missing until usage telemetry exists

stages.title: Communication strategy
stages.goal: Shape storyline, outline, audience fit, information density, and key takeaways.

user_stage_log_contract.accounting_policy: OPL projects duration/token/cost status, source refs, and explicit missing reasons; duration may use provider or attempt wall-clock fallback for user readability while duration_telemetry_status stays missing until usage telemetry exists

stages.title: Visual direction
stages.goal: Define layout density, image strategy, visual language, and feasibility before artifact creation.

user_stage_log_contract.accounting_policy: OPL projects duration/token/cost status, source refs, and explicit missing reasons; duration may use provider or attempt wall-clock fallback for user readability while duration_telemetry_status stays missing until usage telemetry exists

stages.title: Artifact creation
stages.goal: Create the visual deliverable through the selected RCA route while preserving source truth.

user_stage_log_contract.accounting_policy: OPL projects duration/token/cost status, source refs, and explicit missing reasons; duration may use provider or attempt wall-clock fallback for user readability while duration_telemetry_status stays missing until usage telemetry exists

stages.title: Review and revision
stages.goal: Run visual, screenshot, source-fidelity, and repair gates before export.

user_stage_log_contract.accounting_policy: OPL projects duration/token/cost status, source refs, and explicit missing reasons; duration may use provider or attempt wall-clock fallback for user readability while duration_telemetry_status stays missing until usage telemetry exists

stages.title: Package and handoff
stages.goal: Export final files, preview metadata, resume handles, and operator handoff refs.

user_stage_log_contract.accounting_policy: OPL projects duration/token/cost status, source refs, and explicit missing reasons; duration may use provider or attempt wall-clock fallback for user readability while duration_telemetry_status stays missing until usage telemetry exists

notes: RCA keeps declarative visual stage refs only; OPL owns generated/hosted generic stage-control surfaces.
OPL provider may schedule stage attempts from generated surfaces; it must not own RCA visual/artifact/review authority.
